overall.description: A first-person tactical scanner view from the video game Star Wars Jedi: Survivor, surveying the desert settlement of Kobaa Village at night. The player uses a binocular interface with a purple digital overlay to scan the environment, zooming in on industrial structures and identifying hostile pirate raiders.

agents.ego_description: scanning the village perimeter through the tactical binoculars, surveying distant structures and terrain

entered.detail: tall wooden watchtower with platform visible against the night sky
small corrugated metal structure with sloped roof
circular communication dish mounted on a pole
tall metal tower with antenna arrays
tall palm tree silhouetted against the dark sky

segments.scene_description: Initial reconnaissance scan of the desert village from a distance, showing scattered industrial structures including watchtowers, metal sheds, and communication equipment against the night sky. The camera pans smoothly across the settlement perimeter.

scene_state.functional_zone: industrial building interior with red lighting

events.description: zooms in on industrial building with red interior lighting
red artificial light becomes prominent as view focuses on building interior

agents.ego_description: closely inspecting the interior of a metal structure through the scanner, focusing on red light sources and machinery

entered.detail: large metal industrial structure with corrugated walls
intense red light emanating from within the structure
metal mesh flooring on elevated platforms

segments.scene_description: The camera zooms in on a specific industrial building, revealing metal catwalks, machinery pipes, and a mysterious red glow emanating from within the structure. The view transitions from wide exterior to detailed interior inspection.

scene_state.functional_zone: hostile encounter zone with pirate raiders

events.description: enemy detection system activates, identifying pirates in the village
scanner tracks moving pirate raider through the settlement

agents.ego_description: tracking hostile pirate raiders through the scanner, maintaining focus on enemy movements and positions

notable_agents.action: pirate raider walking through the village carrying a weapon, marked with red enemy indicator
second pirate visible near wooden barricades, patrolling the area

entered.detail: crude wooden defensive barriers and fortifications
tall wooden guard tower with ladder

segments.scene_description: Enemy detection mode activates, revealing pirate raiders moving through the village. The camera tracks the hostiles as they patrol near wooden barricades and metal walkways, with distance markers and enemy labels appearing on the scanner interface.

events.description: scene darkens significantly as scanner pulls back and visibility reduces
zooms out to wide view of the village

agents.ego_description: pulling back to a wide overview as visibility decreases, completing the surveillance sweep

entered.detail: pitch black night sky with minimal stars visible

segments.scene_description: The scanner zooms out to a final wide view of the village, but the scene rapidly darkens, reducing visibility of the settlement to silhouettes against the night sky as the surveillance sequence concludes.

merged_segments.scene_description: The shot follows a continuous tactical scan of a desert village at night that shifts from a wide reconnaissance view to a detailed enemy analysis before fading into darkness. It begins with a smooth pan across the settlement perimeter, surveying scattered industrial watchtowers and metal sheds against the night sky. As the camera zooms in, the perspective transitions from the wide exterior to a detailed inspection of an industrial building, revealing metal catwalks and a mysterious red glow emanating from within. The scene then shifts into an enemy detection mode, tracking pirate raiders as they patrol near wooden barricades and metal walkways while digital labels appear on the interface. Finally, the scanner zooms out to a broad view of the village before the environment rapidly darkens, reducing the settlement to mere silhouettes against the night.
